# 安装包下载中心

下载 zip，解压后，把里面的 `skills/` 目录复制到你的 OpenClaw workspace `skills/` 下即可。

## 可直接下载

### QA 核心安装包
- 页面查看：[`qa-core-pack.zip`](./qa-core-pack.zip)
- 直接下载：<https://raw.githubusercontent.com/QA19816-glitch/QA-agent/main/dist/install-packs/qa-core-pack.zip>

### 前端 / 页面性能专项安装包
- 页面查看：[`frontend-performance-pack.zip`](./frontend-performance-pack.zip)
- 直接下载：<https://raw.githubusercontent.com/QA19816-glitch/QA-agent/main/dist/install-packs/frontend-performance-pack.zip>

- 页面查看：[`api-testing-pack.zip`](./api-testing-pack.zip)
- 直接下载：<https://raw.githubusercontent.com/QA19816-glitch/QA-agent/main/dist/install-packs/api-testing-pack.zip>
